creator: stephleg@free.fr
text:
Hello,

I tried to update lang/ghc port with "portupgrade -vNfr lang/ghc" but i get the following error:

..
[22 of 27] Compiling Distribution.ParseUtils ( libraries/Cabal/Cabal/Distribution/ParseUtils.hs, bootstrapping/Distribution/ParseUtils.o )
[23 of 27] Compiling Distribution.InstalledPackageInfo ( libraries/Cabal/Cabal/Distribution/InstalledPackageInfo.hs, bootstrapping/Distribution/InstalledPackageInfo.o )
gmake[1]: *** [utils/ghc-pkg/dist/build/ghc-pkg] Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)


Please see the enclosed file for full details.

Regards,
Stéphane.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to build lang/ghc port.
